items.title: Critical App Lock Fix
items.description: Resolved a critical crash when enabling App Lock on devices with modern adaptive icons. Fixed the underlying drawable compatibility issue for a more robust security experience.

items.title: Official Website Integration
items.description: Added direct links to the official product website in About and Contact screens for easier access to support and documentation.

items.title: Improved Share Experience
items.description: Sharing NoteNext now includes the official website link alongside the Play Store and GitHub links for better discoverability.

items.title: Notification Icon Compatibility
items.description: Updated system notification icons to ensure perfect visibility in the status bar across all Android versions.

items.title: Branded Security Experience
items.description: Added the NoteNext logo to the app lock screen for a more polished and professional security interface.

items.title: Hardened PIN Security
items.description: Upgraded internal PIN storage with industry-standard hashing (PBKDF2) and added screenshot protection to the lock screen for maximum privacy.

items.title: Enhanced Decoy Privacy
items.description: Biometric login is now intelligently hidden when the Decoy Vault is active, preserving plausible deniability.

items.title: Pinpoint Self-Destruct
items.description: Rewrote the self-destruct engine to use exact system alarms, ensuring ephemeral notes expire precisely when intended.

items.title: Security & Stability Fixes
items.description: Disabled insecure cloud backups and resolved a critical bug that could lead to data loss during decryption failures.

items.title: Decoy Vault & Hardened Privacy
items.description: Introduced the Decoy Vault—a secondary PIN system that reveals a separate set of notes. Automatically enforces App Lock when enabled for maximum security.

items.title: Custom Self-Destruct Timer
items.description: Take full control of ephemeral notes with a new custom date and time picker for self-destructing content.

items.title: Material 3 Expressive Motion
items.description: Enhanced the UI with fluid M3 Expressive animations, including new exit motions for AI summary sheets and polished transitions.

items.title: Modern Component Architecture
items.description: Fully adopted M3 Expressive components and tokenized hardcoded colors for better theme consistency and responsiveness.

items.title: Checklist & Label Fixes
items.description: Improved checklist preview visibility and fixed an issue where existing labels wouldn't populate correctly in the management dialog.

items.title: Privacy-First AI Subsystem
items.description: Introduced a comprehensive AI hub with 9 powerful features including Tone Rewriter, Auto-Tagging, Smart Reminders, and Linked Notes. Features a master kill-switch and per-feature toggles to ensure 100% user control and privacy.

items.title: AI Usage Dashboard
items.description: New local-only dashboard to track AI feature usage and acceptance rates with zero data leaving your device.

items.title: Compact Editor UI
items.description: Redesigned the Add/Edit note screen with reduced padding and scaled-down elements for better content visibility, mirroring the Google Keep experience.

items.title: Modernized Settings
items.description: Refined the settings screen with a more modern look, improved dialogs, and better category organization.

items.title: Interactive Checklist Experience
items.description: Revolutionized checklist management with smooth, real-time drag-and-drop tracking and smart keyboard integration (Enter to add, Backspace to remove).

items.title: Indian & Open Source Identity
items.description: Updated app mission to highlight our roots as a proudly Indian, 100% free, and open-source project dedicated to privacy.

items.title: Performance & State Stability
items.description: Optimized recompositions using immutable collections and marked core data models as stable for a buttery-smooth UI experience.

items.title: Shared Element Transitions
items.description: Implemented beautiful shared element transitions and AI streaming for project-based notes.

items.title: Reliability & Bug Fixes
items.description: Fixed Room compatibility issues with immutable types, resolved lifecycle-related crashes, and improved backup/restore for Todo items.

items.title: Performance & Stability
items.description: Improved app launch speed, reduced memory usage, and fixed rare crashes on Android 15.

items.title: Enhanced Backup Reliability
items.description: Backup and restore now handle large note sets more efficiently and provide clearer error messages.

items.title: UI Polish & Accessibility
items.description: Refined button contrast, improved TalkBack support, and fixed layout glitches in landscape mode.

items.title: Bug Fixes
items.description: Resolved issues with project nesting, reminders not firing, and rare sync failures.

items.title: Advanced Todo & Productivity
items.description: Enhanced Todo feature with subtasks, reminders, and a productivity dashboard for daily progress tracking.

items.title: Nested Project Hierarchy
items.description: Organize your notes with unlimited project nesting, indentation support, and hierarchical traversal.

items.title: AI Provider Model Selection
items.description: Select specific models for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Groq. Includes support for GPT-4.5 and Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

items.title: More Options Responsiveness
items.description: Fixed responsiveness issues in the More Options sheet when fully expanded and improved gesture handling.

items.title: Infrastructure & Modularization
items.description: Modularized the Todo feature and improved AI provider infrastructure for better scalability.

items.title: Interactive Widgets & Lists
items.description: Introduced interactive Jetpack Glance widgets for pinned notes and checklists. Added bulleted list support, link auto-detection, and project notes parity.

items.title: Search & Find Integration
items.description: Added native in-note search with result highlighting and a new 'Find in Note' functionality for faster navigation.

items.title: High-Performance Editor
items.description: Optimized the editor with text chunking for smoother handling of long notes. Resolved cursor jumping, keyboard layout issues, and stabilized state management.

items.title: Polished & Responsive UI
items.description: Refined the UI with thinner bottom toolbars, reduced padding, and animated sync indicators for a more modern feel.

items.title: Fast Startup & Metadata
items.description: Enhanced app startup and note list scrolling by optimizing metadata fetching and implementing lifecycle-aware async initialization.

items.title: Database & Serialization Fixes
items.description: Fixed SQL errors in note sorting, resolved serialization crashes in minified builds, and added database indices for performance.

items.title: AI Power & Customization
items.description: Added support for custom Groq API keys and model selection. Enjoy faster AI with intelligent rate-limit awareness and secure key encryption.

items.title: Ultra-Reliable Backups
items.description: Complete overhaul of the backup system. Now featuring atomic restores for data safety, SHA-256 integrity verification, and secure password storage.

items.title: Smart Auto-Backups
items.description: Never lose a note again with incremental backups that trigger automatically when you edit or charge your device.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Locked notes now show their titles for easier organization while keeping content fully encrypted. Added a 2-minute session timeout for enhanced security.

items.title: New Drawing Experience
items.description: Redesigned drawing canvas with a clean white background, responsive Material 3 tools, and true erasing capabilities.

items.title: Fluid UI Animations
items.description: Experience the new Material 3 Expressive motion engine with smooth animations for note pinning and label management.

items.title: System Stability
items.description: Resolved critical memory leaks, fixed Android 15 compatibility issues, and improved database migration reliability.

items.title: Drawing Canvas & Multimedia
items.description: Introduced a new drawing canvas with Material 3 Expressive controls and support for cross-note linking, allowing you to connect thoughts visually.

items.title: Performance Engine Upgrade
items.description: Migrated to Paging 3 for buttery-smooth scrolling, implemented FTS4 for near-instant search results, and upgraded to Coil 3 for high-performance image loading.

items.title: Hardened Biometric Security
items.description: Refactored biometric authentication with cryptographic binding and resolved critical encryption-related crashes for maximum data protection.

items.title: Expressive UI Motion
items.description: Upgraded AI dialogs and system transitions to the Material 3 Expressive motion engine, featuring refined spring physics and tactile feedback.

items.title: Infrastructure & Stability
items.description: Modernized the build system with Hilt 2.59.2 and AGP 9.1.0 compatibility, while resolving numerous compilation and startup stability issues.

items.title: Share Link Integration
items.description: Added the direct Play Store link to the app share dialog to help you easily share NoteNext with others.

items.title: Assistant Integration
items.description: NoteNext is now a first-class citizen! Use voice commands with Google Assistant to create notes, add to lists, or find specific notes natively.

items.title: Material 3 Expressive & Predictive Back
items.description: Implemented the latest M3 Expressive motion engine and Predictive Back gestures for a more fluid, responsive, and modern user experience.

items.title: AI Analyzer UI Fixes
items.description: Restored the AI Analyzer functionality in both the Add/Edit and Project screens with new summary sheets.

items.title: Navigation & Backstack Cleanup
items.description: Refactored the navigation drawer to ensure a clean backstack, fixing issues with unexpected screen jumping and double-clicks.

items.title: Startup & Splash Optimization
items.description: Optimized app startup time by removing redundant delays and refining the system splash screen transition.

items.title: M3 Expressive Redesign
items.description: Redesigned the entire app with Material 3 Expressive components, smooth spring animations, and a modern SplashScreen.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Optimized note list scrolling with efficient item reuse and removed layout jumping.

items.title: Decorative Top Bar
items.description: Enhanced the Add/Edit screen with decorative M3E buttons and centered alignment.

items.title: Project View AI & Sync
items.description: Brought AI summarization, grammar fixes, and live sync indicators to the Project view.

items.title: Critical Bug Fixes
items.description: Fixed app crashes when opening locked notes and during AI summarization in projects.

items.title: Update & Share
items.description: Redesigned the update dialog with wavy indicators and added the Play Store link to share options.
